title: Classic Farlands Reforged
description: Neoforge port bringing the classic style of Far Lands to 1.21.1
body:
![farlands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f854834b4f2457aede7e4495e2cc050b5158378_0.webp)

This mod brings back the Far Lands in their classic appearance to Neoforge 1.21.1.

By default they generate at X or Z coordinates 12,550,821 and higher in all three dimensions, but the distance is configurable in the Neoforge config menu.

As a side effect, Monolith-like formations may also generate before the far lands at extreme distances.

## Credits
- Perlin noise unfix based on Farlands Reborn (MIT License) by AdyTech99
- The original [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/classic-farlands)
  
## Compat
- Far lands mods are incompatible with C2ME.
- Thanks to [Mixson](https://modrinth.com/mod/mixson), v1.3.0+ should be compatible with almost all worldgen mods/datapacks! During testing, this mod works great with [WWOO](https://modrinth.com/mod/wwoo) and [Cascades Cool Biomes](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cascades-cool-biomes) for a familiar modern but beta-like world generation.
